expectations.evidence: No triage-issue sub-skill loaded. States: "Unable to complete" and relies on MCP plugin tools, not skill workflows.

expectations.text: Extracts error signature, component (payment), and symptom (checkout failing)
expectations.evidence: Identifies: "Connection timeout" errors, "payment service" component, and "checkout" as the affected flow throughout the approach.

expectations.text: Runs at least 2 different search queries with different JQL strategies
expectations.evidence: Ran three parallel JQL searches: open issues matching timeout/connection timeout, resolved issues for regression check, and payment-related issues with error/timeout/checkout terms.

expectations.text: Searches for both open and resolved issues
expectations.evidence: Step 1 searches open issues (status NOT IN Done/Closed), Step 2 explicitly searches resolved issues for regression check (status IN Done/Closed/Resolved AND resolved >= -90d).
Step 4 describes assessment categories: "High confidence duplicate", "Related but different" with instructions to assess each match.

expectations.text: Offers options: create new, comment on existing, or show more details
expectations.evidence: Step 4 offers: high confidence duplicate -> add comment, related but different -> link and file new, no matches -> create new bug. Step 5 shows creating a new bug. Step 6 mentions linking.

expectations.text: Asks which project if not specified, or searches broadly
expectations.evidence: Assumes project DO without asking. Does not search broadly or ask which project to use.
Does not reference bug-report-templates.md. The description is structured but not attributed to any reference document.
